Academic Advising

Consultancy Services and Project Collaborations

MENU

Dear Private Sector Representatives,

Please contact our Research and Project Development Directorate - ARPROGED University-Industry Cooperation Unit to have academicians from our university as consultants in your industrial projects you are developing.

The main purpose of the University-Industry Cooperation Unit is to contribute to the transformation of the scientific potential of the university into economic value by transferring it to industry and to ensure sustainable cooperation based on mutual trust between academicians and industrialists by directing the companies in the region to R&D and innovation studies.

We care that you get to know our academicians closely before the collaborations to be made. For this reason, you can access important information such as the national-international achievements of our academicians and the fields of activity in which they can provide consultancy from our 'Academician Activity Catalog'.
